greeting.title: CEO's Message
greeting.motto: 'Creating New Standards for a Great and Righteous Golf Environment'
greeting.p1: Based on our corporate philosophy of 'Creating New Standards for a Great and Righteous Golf Environment,' we have strived to achieve our dream of creating world-class golf courses.
greeting.p2: To realize that dream, we assembled the best domestic and international experts in each field, engaged in golf course construction and remodeling, and have contributed to creating a new golf culture with trust as our foremost value.
greeting.p3: The Daejung Group pursues 'Happy Management'—creating a happy workplace for employees and a happy society through employees who make customers' golf courses happy.
greeting.p4: As society advances, people desire even more beautiful and pleasant golf course environments. Daejung will continue to pursue creative and trustworthy quality management to meet the diverse needs of our customers.
greeting.career1: Current: CEO, Cyprus Golf & Resort (Operator: Daejung TM Co., Ltd.)
greeting.career2: Current: Korea Top 10 Golf Course Selection Committee Member
greeting.career3: Current: Korea Eco-Friendly Golf Course Selection Committee Member
greeting.edu1: Ph.D. in Plant Pathology, Gyeongsang National University
greeting.edu3: B.S. in Agricultural Biology, Gyeongsang National University
greeting.edu4: Golf Course Management Executive Program, Kwangwoon University

ci.title: CI
ci.symbolDesc: The 7 rings represent Daejung's 7 affiliates. Linked without interruption, they come together to form a star that illuminates the future of the Daejung family. The blue tones — symbolizing integrity and strength — and the green tones — symbolizing abundance and vitality — express the founding spirit of Daejung: always honest and prosperous.
ci.colorDesc: Seven brand colors represent each affiliate's unique identity and brand character.
ci.logotypeDesc: The Daejung Golf logotype symbolizes trust, expertise, and eco-friendly management.

affiliates.title: Affiliates
affiliates.intro: The Daejung Group consists of 7 specialized affiliates covering all aspects of the golf industry, including course management, construction, distribution, and research.
affiliates.a1Desc: Korea's No.1 golf course management company specializing in course management, design, supervision, and operation.
affiliates.a2Desc: Golf course operation specialist. Currently operating Jeju Cyprus Golf & Resort (36 holes).
affiliates.a3Desc: Distribution specialist for golf course fertilizers, pesticides, seeds, and materials.
affiliates.a4Desc: Specialist in golf course construction, civil engineering, and landscape works.
affiliates.a5Desc: Forest business and tree hospital, specializing in arboricultural services.
affiliates.a6Desc: Developer and manufacturer of autonomous AI robots (Dio F-1, R-1).
affiliates.a7Desc: Leisure and golf course operations services.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.intro: Daejung Golf holds numerous domestic and international quality and environmental certifications, demonstrating our commitment to excellence.

courseManagement.title: Course Management
courseManagement.bannerTitle: Entrust all your course concerns to Korea's best expert group.
courseManagement.bannerDesc: Daejung has walked a single path for years with quality-first management, making it Korea's No.1 company in name and reality. With know-how accumulated from managing the most golf courses nationwide and Korea's largest corporate turfgrass research institute, we maintain the highest turf quality through scientific and differentiated eco-friendly management techniques.

operation.title: Course Operation
operation.bannerTitle: A professional operations group delivering stable revenue and top course quality — in any business environment
operation.bannerDesc: Course quality is the foundation of customer service. We promise to elevate your golf course's value by realizing the highest course standards. With deep industry experience and outstanding planning, we will work our hardest to generate stable returns for your course.
operation.current1Desc: Jeju Island's premier golf resort, renowned for its stunning natural scenery and exceptional course quality.
operation.feat1Desc: We build systems that actively collect and instantly respond to guest feedback, maximizing customer satisfaction.
operation.feat2Desc: Our staff greet guests with a warm smile and refined professionalism at every touchpoint.
operation.feat3Desc: We provide fine-dining level cuisine and premium merchandise to deliver the ultimate guest experience.
operation.feat4Desc: From the first hole to the last, we ensure a seamless, enjoyable round with no inconvenience on course.

design.title: Design & Supervision
design.bannerTitle: Design and supervision for 20+ golf courses
design.bannerDesc: Korea's premier golf course design and supervision company, delivering the highest course quality.
design.i1Desc: Full scope from terrain analysis to complete course layout design
design.i2Desc: Stage-by-stage quality inspection and professional supervision
design.i3Desc: Expert design for upgrading and modernizing existing courses

safety.title: Safety Management
safety.bannerTitle: Creating a safe golf course environment
safety.bannerDesc: A systematic safety management system that puts the safety of all guests and staff first.
safety.sys1Desc: Regular inspection and immediate action on hazards within the course
safety.sys2Desc: Regular safety education and drills for all staff
safety.sys3Desc: Emergency response manuals and communication systems in operation
safety.sys4Desc: Regular inspection and safety maintenance of course management equipment
safety.cert1: Compliance with Occupational Safety and Health Act
safety.cert2: Regular safety inspections at least twice a year
safety.cert3: Work environment measurement and corrective actions

landscape.title: Landscape Management
landscape.bannerDesc: We operate our own turf farm and pine farm to supply the highest quality turf and trees.
landscape.turfDesc: We operate a 120,000㎡ (18-hole scale) turfgrass production farm in Paengseong, Pyeongtaek, Gyeonggi-do, using premium river sand to produce dense, high-quality turf.
landscape.pineDesc: Our pine farm in Buan, North Jeolla Province supplies 2,000+ premium pines at competitive prices.

golfConstruction.title: Golf Course Construction
golfConstruction.bannerDesc: The practical answer for improving course quality — DAEJUNG-GOLF ENGINEERING CO.,LTD.

intro.title: Research Institute
intro.bannerTitle: Daejung Turfgrass Research Institute is a nationally certified private research institute affiliated with Daejung.
intro.bannerDesc: Registered as an agrochemical testing research institution by the Rural Development Administration, conducting efficacy and phytotoxicity tests for fungicides, herbicides, insecticides, and growth regulators.
intro.solutionTitle: We provide professional and practical solutions to help operate golf courses in a low-cost, high-quality, and eco-friendly manner.
intro.solution1: Climate change response prediction programs tailored for golf courses
intro.solution2: Scientific management of analysis (turf, soil, water) and disease/pest identification
intro.solution3: Reduce management costs through scientific predictive management
intro.solution4: Implementation of eco-friendly course management systems
intro.equip1Desc: Simultaneous analysis of 50 elements in soil, turf, water, and fertilizer (ppb: 1/10,000,000)
intro.equip2Desc: Simultaneously digests 50 samples of soil and turf within 3 hours
intro.equip3Desc: Measures soil water supply / drainage / aeration / specific gravity
intro.equip4Desc: Disease and pest identification and culture analysis
intro.equip5Desc: Disease and pest identification and culture
intro.equip6Desc: Disease and pest identification and culture analysis
intro.equip7Desc: Soil nitrogen and phosphorus measurement instruments

fields.title: Research Fields
fields.bannerTitle: Specialized research for scientific golf course management
fields.bannerDesc: Daejung Turfgrass Research Institute advances the standard of Korean golf courses through 7 analysis categories and 8 key research activities.
fields.t1: Integrated disease and pest management research for golf course turf
fields.t2: Efficacy and phytotoxicity testing of eco-friendly pesticides and fertilizers
fields.t3: Turfgrass variety adaptability and physiological characterization
fields.t4: Golf course soil and water quality analysis services
fields.t5: Development of climate change-adaptive turf management technologies
fields.t6: Testing research for new pesticide registration
fields.t7: Precision analysis of turf and soil nutrient content

shop.title: Partners
shop.partnerDesc: Daejung F&D partners with world-class suppliers to deliver top-quality golf course products.
shop.comingSoonDesc: Our online store is currently under development. For product orders and inquiries, please contact our customer service team.
shop.shopDesc: We're preparing our online ordering service. Please check back soon.

talent.title: Talent
talent.introDesc: Daejung Golf is looking for people who grow together and create the highest value.
talent.t1Desc: Professionals who continuously learn and pursue excellence in their field
talent.t2Desc: Creative talent who actively embraces new possibilities and change
talent.t3Desc: People who fulfill their responsibilities with dedication and honesty
talent.t4Desc: Individuals who grow together through communication and collaboration

Robot.heroSubtitle: The new standard in unmanned course management

f1.name: Dio F-1
f1.tagline: Fully Automated Unmanned Course Management Equipment
f1.feature1Desc: Autonomous navigation between charging station and fairway, auto-charging
f1.feature3Desc: 3D LiDAR, 3 cameras, AI recognition algorithm, golf cart & obstacle detection
f1.feature4Desc: Schedule mowing via app, real-time feedback, per-fairway summary reports
f1.benefit1: Significant reduction in course management costs through full automation (labor & fuel)
f1.benefit2: Operable anytime regardless of weather or day/night conditions
f1.benefit3: Efficiency and reliability verified through 1+ year of field testing
f1.step1Desc: Scan fairway boundaries using one golf cart and mapping equipment
f1.step2Desc: Tag hole numbers, designate inter-fairway travel routes
f1.step3Desc: Set cutting direction, pattern type, start time, and sequence
f1.step4Desc: Leave the rest to the robot

r1.name: Dio R-1
r1.tagline: Fully Automated Unmanned Course Management Equipment
r1.description: Rotary equipment dedicated to rough mowing — cuts grass, thick weeds, and branches. Climbs slopes up to 35°. Equipped with person and object avoidance capability.
r1.benefit1: Significant reduction in course management costs through full automation (labor & fuel)
r1.benefit2: Operable anytime regardless of weather or day/night conditions

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.companyInfo: Daejung Golf Engineering Co., Ltd. (hereinafter 'Company') establishes and discloses this Privacy Policy in accordance with the Personal Information Protection Act to protect user privacy and handle related grievances promptly and smoothly.
Privacy.s1:
The Company collects the following personal information:
· Required: Name, User ID, Password, Email address, Phone number
· Information that may be generated during service use: Access IP, Cookies, Service usage records
Privacy.s2:
The Company uses collected personal information for:
· Member registration and management: Verifying membership intent, identity verification, maintaining membership
· Service provision: Online store services, order and payment processing
· Customer inquiries: Complaint handling, notice delivery
Privacy.s3:
Personal information is destroyed without delay once the purpose of collection and use is achieved.
· Retained until membership withdrawal
· Exceptions apply where required by applicable law:
  - Records regarding contracts or withdrawal: 5 years (E-Commerce Act)
  - Records of consumer complaints or disputes: 3 years (E-Commerce Act)
Privacy.s4: The Company does not provide users' personal information to third parties as a rule. Exceptions apply with user consent or when required by applicable law.
Privacy.s5: The Company currently does not outsource personal information processing to external parties.
Privacy.s6:
Users have the following rights regarding personal information processing:
· Right to access personal information
· Right to request correction of errors
· Right to request deletion
· Right to request suspension of processing
These rights may be exercised by written request, phone, or email to the Company, and the Company will take prompt action.
Privacy.s7:
The Company implements the following technical and administrative measures to ensure security:
· Minimizing staff handling personal information and conducting training
· Technical measures against hacking and similar threats
· Encryption of personal information
· Maintaining and protecting access logs
Privacy.s8:
The Company has designated a Privacy Officer responsible for personal information processing:
· Name: Min Gyu-young
· Title: CEO
· Contact: 031-373-8914
· Address: 3-8, Wonam-ro 39beon-gil, Namsa-myeon, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.s1: These Terms govern the conditions and procedures for using services (hereinafter 'Service') provided by the website operated by Daejung Golf Engineering Co., Ltd. (hereinafter 'Company').
Terms.s2:
Terms used herein are defined as follows:
· 'Member': A person who has entered into a service agreement with the Company
· 'User ID': A combination of letters and numbers set by the member and approved by the Company for identification
· 'Password': A combination of letters and numbers set by the member to protect their confidentiality
Terms.s3:
① These Terms take effect upon posting on the website.
② The Company may amend these Terms for reasonable cause and will notify changes through notices on the website.
Terms.s4: Persons wishing to become members apply for membership by completing the registration form specified by the Company and agreeing to these Terms.
Terms.s5:
The Company provides the following services:
· Company information and business field guidance
· Product and service introductions
· Customer inquiry reception and handling
· Other services developed by the Company or provided through agreements with partners
Terms.s6: Service is available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year in principle. However, service may be temporarily suspended due to business or technical reasons.
Terms.s7:
Members must not:
· Register false information
· Steal another person's information
· Alter information posted by the Company
· Transmit information other than that specified by the Company
· Infringe on the Company's or third parties' copyrights or intellectual property rights
Terms.s8: The Company shall not engage in acts prohibited by law or these Terms or contrary to public order, and will strive to provide services continuously and stably.
Terms.s9:
① Members may apply for service termination at any time, and the Company will process the withdrawal immediately.
② The Company may restrict service use if a member violates these Terms.
Terms.s10:
① The Company is exempt from liability when unable to provide service due to natural disasters or force majeure.
② The Company is not responsible for service disruptions caused by a member's own fault.
Terms.s11: Disputes arising between the Company and members shall be governed by Korean law, and the competent court shall be the court having jurisdiction over the Company's location.
